results.title: Brett Payne - CFO at Tessera Group Inc. | LinkedIn
results.snippet: CFO at Tessera Group Inc. · In early 1997, Brett joined Belcor Industries, an upstart packaging machine manufacturer based in Richmond, BC. After gaining a significant amount of experience within the packaging automation industry, in 2007, Brett went out on his own. The acquisition of MD Packaging in 2017 led to the creation of the Tessera Group with his business partners. The Tessera Group ...
